scripts.build: env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/build cargo build --release
scripts.build:local: env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 cargo build --release && bash scripts/install-local.sh
scripts.build:clean: rm -rf target/build target/lint target/test target/typecheck && env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/build cargo build --release
scripts.test: env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/test cargo test --quiet -- --test-threads=1
scripts.lint: env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/lint cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings
scripts.typecheck: env PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=target/typecheck cargo check --quiet
